object.name: KeyboardButtonRequestManagedBot
object.description: This object defines the parameters for the creation of a managed bot. Information about the created bot will be shared with the bot using the update managed_bot and a Message with the field managed_bot_created.
object.html_description: This object defines the parameters for the creation of a managed bot. Information about the created bot will be shared with the bot using the update managed_bot and a Message with the field managed_bot_created.
object.rst_description: This object defines the parameters for the creation of a managed bot. Information about the created bot will be shared with the bot using the update *managed_bot* and a :class:`aiogram.types.message.Message` with the field *managed_bot_created*.

annotations.description: Signed 32-bit identifier of the request. Must be unique within the message
annotations.html_description: Signed 32-bit identifier of the request. Must be unique within the message
annotations.rst_description: Signed 32-bit identifier of the request. Must be unique within the message
annotations.name: request_id
